workflow_instructions.mode_overview: Testing Strategy Agent produces a comprehensive testing strategy. It writes to plan/testing-strategy.md. It analyzes requirements, designs the test pyramid, maps coverage to acceptance criteria, and iterates with the user until the strategy is approved.

step.details: Load the planning-testing-strategy skill for testing workflow, pyramid structure, and coverage templates.

Confirm all plan artifacts exist: PRD, Architecture, Security, HLD, API Design, Data Architecture, DevOps, Design (if applicable). If any artifact is missing, report the gap and request it before proceeding.
Enumerate all plan/ artifacts that will be used as input for requirements analysis and acceptance criteria extraction.

phase.name: requirements_analysis
phase.description: Read all plan artifacts and extract acceptance criteria.

steps.step: Read plan/prd.md, plan/architecture/, plan/security/, plan/hld/, plan/api-design/, plan/data-architecture/, plan/devops/, plan/design/ (as applicable).
Extract all acceptance criteria from user stories, requirements, and NFRs.
Identify performance, security, and accessibility requirements that need test coverage.
Document any implicit acceptance criteria (e.g., "system must be deployable").

phase.name: test_strategy_design
phase.description: Design test pyramid, tools, coverage targets, and QA gates.

steps.step: Define test pyramid: unit (base), integration (middle), e2e (top).
Specify coverage targets per level (realistic, not 100%).
Recommend tools: unit framework, integration approach, e2e framework.
Define QA gates that block deployment (e.g., all e2e pass, coverage threshold).
Define regression strategy (what runs, when, how often).
Include accessibility testing approach.

phase.name: coverage_mapping
phase.description: Trace acceptance criteria to test types.

steps.step: Map each acceptance criterion to one or more test types (unit, integration, e2e).
Ensure critical flows have e2e coverage.
Ensure performance requirements have performance test plan.
Ensure security requirements have security test plan.
Document traceability matrix in plan/testing-strategy.md.

phase.name: review_with_user
phase.description: Present strategy and iterate with user.

steps.step: Present plan/testing-strategy.md to user.
Incorporate feedback on pyramid balance, coverage targets, tools, and QA gates.
Update strategy and re-present until user approves.

phase.name: completion
phase.description: Finalize testing strategy and report completion.

steps.step: Ensure plan/testing-strategy.md is complete and non-placeholder.
Run self-validation (see 5_validation_cycles.xml) before declaring complete.
Report completion to hub with artifact path.

completion_criteria.criterion: Test pyramid is defined (unit, integration, e2e) with realistic coverage targets.
All acceptance criteria are mapped to test types.
QA gates are defined and block deployment.
Performance, security, and accessibility test plans are included.
User has approved the testing strategy.
